zh: 给alex.chen@example.com发封邮件，主题写“快速更新”，正文写“你有空的时候能把最新进展发给我吗？”
en: Send an email to alex.chen@example.com with the subject "Quick update" and the body "Can you send me the latest update when you have a moment?".

zh:
收件人：jordan.lee@example.com  
主题：明天午饭？  
正文：请看一下这份文件，说说你的想法。
en: Compose and send an email to jordan.lee@example.com titled "Lunch tomorrow?" saying "Please review the document and share your thoughts.".

zh: 给 maya.patel@example.com 发一封邮件，主题写“Project status”，内容写“我大概15分钟后到。”
en: Send maya.patel@example.com an email with subject "Project status" and message "I'll be there in about 15 minutes.".

zh: 你能给noah.kim@example.com发封邮件吗？主题写“提醒”，正文写“再次感谢你今天提供的帮助。”
en: Can you send an email to noah.kim@example.com? Use "Reminder" as the subject and "Thanks again for your help today." as the body.

zh: 给emma.wilson@example.com发一封邮件，主题写“旅行计划”，正文写“我们可以把会议改到明天上午吗？”
en: Send an email to emma.wilson@example.com with the subject "Travel plan" and the body "Can we reschedule our meeting to tomorrow morning?".

zh: 请给liam.brown@example.com发邮件，主题写“周末计划”，内容写“这是今天讨论的笔记”。
en: Please email liam.brown@example.com. Subject: "Weekend plan". Message: "Here are the notes from today's discussion.".

zh: 撰写并发送一封邮件到 sophia.garcia@example.com，标题为“发票问题”，内容为“我们下午1点在大厅附近见面。”
en: Compose and send an email to sophia.garcia@example.com titled "Invoice question" saying "Let's meet near the lobby at 1 PM.".
